get.description: Returns a list of service providers which meet the search criteria.

parameters.name: serviceProviders
parameters.description: A comma separated list of service providers.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: A comma separated list of service provider statuses. Valid values are: LIVE,RECENTLY_ADDED,BUILDING

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: A comma separated list of service provider categories. Valid values are: BANK_LINKING,CRYPTO_OFFRAMP,CRYPTO_ONRAMP,CRYPTO_TRANSFER,CRYPTO_VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_OFFRAMP,CRYPTO_VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT_ONRAMP,FIAT_PAYMENTS. Note: CRYPTO_ONRAMP_SWAP and CRYPTO_OFFRAMP_SWAP are server-driven and cannot be requested directly.

parameters.name: accountFilter
parameters.description: Filter by account configuration. Will only include properties supported by the service providers configured for the account of the API authentication token used.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: A comma separated list of countries.

parameters.name: fiatCurrencies
parameters.description: A comma separated list of fiat currencies.

parameters.name: cryptoChains
parameters.description: A comma separated list of crypto chains.

parameters.name: cryptoCurrencies
parameters.description: A comma separated list of crypto currencies.

parameters.name: paymentMethodTypes
parameters.description: A comma separated list of payment method types. Valid Values are: Supported Payment Methods

400.description: Bad Request : check request values and format

403.description: Unauthenticated or authenticated with insufficient access

500.description: Server Error. This applies to all 5xx errors, including but not limited to 500, 501, 502, 503, and 504 errors. You should treat all of these errors the same.

serviceProviders.description: List of service providers. If not defined or empty, all applicable service providers are used

RoutingCondition.description:
This is polymorphic based on the operator:
  • CONTAINS - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • CONTAINS_ALL - MultipleValueRoutingCondition
  • CONTAINS_ANY - MultipleValueRoutingCondition
  • CONTAINS_NONE - MultipleValueRoutingCondition
  • GREATER_THAN - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • GREATER_THAN_EQUALS - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • IN - MultipleValueRoutingCondition
  • LESS_THAN - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • LESS_THAN_EQUALS - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • NOT_CONTAINS - SingleValueRoutingCondition
  • NOT_IN - MultipleValueRoutingCondition

Variable value formats:

  • SOURCE_AMOUNT - <3-character currency code><space><numeric amount>
    examples: USD 100, CAD 123.45

  • INSTITUTION_ID - <id>
    examples: Ntj3AwgdridJc2rtfeheku, 29KL1L2iYUV3zUCoSHhwvr

  • COUNTRY_CODE - <2-character country code>
    examples: US, CA

  • PAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE - <payment method>
    examples: VISA, APPLE_PAY

defaultPreference.description: Default service provider preference to use if no rules match

rules.description: Ordered list of rules. The first matching rule will route using its service provider preference

useSmartRouting.description: Whether to use smart routing in addition to any other rules

conditions.description: If all the conditions are true, this rule is true

label.description: A label summarizing what this rule does

preference.description: Service provider preference to use when this rule is true

ServiceProviderPreference.description:
This is polymorphic based on the algorithm:
  • EQUAL_DISTRIBUTION - ListServiceProviderPreference
  • ORDERED - ListServiceProviderPreference
  • SINGLE - SingleServiceProviderPreference
  • WEIGHTED_DISTRIBUTION - WeightedServiceProviderPreference
  • HEALTH - OptionalListServiceProviderPreference
  • PREFER_OAUTH - OptionalListServiceProviderPreference

algorithm.description: Algorithm to select a preferred service provider

serviceProviders.description: Map of service providers to weights

actionDefault.description: Whether or not this is the default profile for the action on this account

signals.description: Signals available at time of request to determine availability and score of routes.
Signals used to determine availability and score

categories.description: The categories which this Service Provider supports.

categoryStatuses.description: The statuses for each of the categories for this Service Provider.

light.description: The light logo URL for the Service Provider.

lightShort.description: The light short logo URL for the Service Provider.

fields.description: The fields supported for this service provider's Config Settings.

required.description: True if this Field is required when configuring this service provider, otherwise false.

fields.description: The fields supported for this service provider's Auth Settings.

required.description: True if this Field is required when configuring this service provider, otherwise false.

name.description: The display name for this Fiat Currency.

accountDetails.description: The account service provider limit overrides. Only present when includeDetails request parameter is set to true.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for these KYC Fiat Level limits.

level1.description: KYC Level 1 limits, level 1 means no document upload is required. Typical information asked for in level 1 include phone number, email address, and SSN (or international equivalent)

level2.description: KYC Level 2 limits, level 2 means document upload is required. Typical information asked for in level 2 include passport and drivers license (or international equivalent).

level3.description: KYC Level 3 limits, level 3 means proof of funds is required. This is for very large purposes, and may involve connecting a user's bank account to show proof of funds.

accountDetails.description: The account service provider limit overrides. Only present when includeDetails request parameter is set to true.
